channel.title: The Red Canoe · Live Dispatches
channel.description: Satellite messages from Violette, Stan and Charlie — La Vérendrye canoe expedition, June 2026.

item.title: Test from the living room on may 31 · 📍 40.3659, -74.6369
item.description: Test from the living room on may 31 · 📍 40.3659, -74.6369

item.title: Pipeline test #3 — if you get this email, the live dispatch system is working. Each satellite message from the trail will arrive in your inbox like this, as soon as it is sent. · 📍 47.2341, -76.5012
item.description: Pipeline test #3 — if you get this email, the live dispatch system is working. Each satellite message from the trail will arrive in your inbox like this, as soon as it is sent. · 📍 47.2341, -76.5012

item.title: Second test. The canoe is packed, the barrel is sealed, and Charlie has been practicing his bow stance. T-minus 24 days. · 📍 47.2341, -76.5012
item.description: Second test. The canoe is packed, the barrel is sealed, and Charlie has been practicing his bow stance. T-minus 24 days. · 📍 47.2341, -76.5012

item.title: Testing the live dispatch system. If you receive this by email, the satellite pipeline is working. See you on the water June 17. · 📍 47.2341, -76.5012
item.description: Testing the live dispatch system. If you receive this by email, the satellite pipeline is working. See you on the water June 17. · 📍 47.2341, -76.5012

item.title:
Test
View the location or send a reply to Stanislas Berteloot: https://inreachlink.com/g8ekpkf25mh2RIswxcpkiYw
Do not reply directly to this message.
This message was sent to you using the inReach two-way satellite communicator with GPS. To learn more, visit http://explore.garmin.com/inreach.
item.description:
Test
View the location or send a reply to Stanislas Berteloot: https://inreachlink.com/g8ekpkf25mh2RIswxcpkiYw
Do not reply directly to this message.
This message was sent to you using the inReach two-way satellite communicator with GPS. To learn more, visit http://explore.garmin.com/inreach.

item.title:
Please Note: Replies to this email are not answered.
You cannot send a direct reply to a message that someone sent you from their inReach. You must return to the original email you received and click the link provided within.
That link will open a web browser with a map of the sender's location as well as a form for typing a reply. This is an automated message.
To learn more about the inReach two-way satellite communicator with GPS, visit https://explore.garmin.com/en-US/inreach/ Thank you
InReach Product Support Team
________________________________
CONFIDENTIALITY NOTICE: This email and any attachments are for the sole use of the intended recipient(s) and contain information that may be Garmin confidential and/or Garmin legally privileged. If you have received this email in error, please notify the sender by reply email and delete the message. Any disclosure, copying, distribution or use of this communication (including attachments) by someone other than the intended recipient is prohibited. Thank you.
item.description:
Please Note: Replies to this email are not answered.
You cannot send a direct reply to a message that someone sent you from their inReach. You must return to the original email you received and click the link provided within.
That link will open a web browser with a map of the sender's location as well as a form for typing a reply. This is an automated message.
To learn more about the inReach two-way satellite communicator with GPS, visit https://explore.garmin.com/en-US/inreach/ Thank you
InReach Product Support Team
________________________________
CONFIDENTIALITY NOTICE: This email and any attachments are for the sole use of the intended recipient(s) and contain information that may be Garmin confidential and/or Garmin legally privileged. If you have received this email in error, please notify the sender by reply email and delete the message. Any disclosure, copying, distribution or use of this communication (including attachments) by someone other than the intended recipient is prohibited. Thank you.

item.title: Test received loud and clear, Stan! Your location came through as well. All good on this end. Pierre Dumont · 📍 40.3658, -74.6369
item.description: Test received loud and clear, Stan! Your location came through as well. All good on this end. Pierre Dumont · 📍 40.3658, -74.6369

item.title: Off the put-in. P110 done. Charlie cried for two minutes then settled. · 📍 47.3123, -76.8422
item.description: Off the put-in. P110 done. Charlie cried for two minutes then settled. · 📍 47.3123, -76.8422
